title: Clear Polyethylene Protective Decorating Sheet (3m x 4m) Pack of 1 - Waterproof, 6 Micron, Essential Protection for Floors & Furniture Against Spills
features: CLEAR VISIBILITY FOR CONVENIENCE: The clear design of our decorating sheet means you can protect your furniture and floors without losing sight of them. Keep an eye on your valuable possessions while keeping them fully protected.

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Made from high-quality polyethylene, this 6-micron thick decorating sheet is designed to withstand spills and splatters of all kinds. Its durability ensures long-lasting protection against the most common decorating mishaps.

WATERPROOF & MILDPROOF: Never worry about water damage or mildew again. Our decorating sheet is completely waterproof, offering unbeatable protection against spills and moisture. Perfect for both indoor and outdoor use.

VERSATILE PROTECTION: This clear protective decorating sheet is your guardian against pesky spillages. At an expansive size of 3m x 4m, it provides comprehensive coverage, ensuring your floors and furniture remain pristine during decorating projects.

EASY TO USE & STORE: Simply unroll it over your desired surface, secure it with tape if needed, and start your project worry-free. After use, fold or roll up the sheet for easy storage until your next project.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality decorating sheet measures 3 metres x 4 metres and has a thickness of six micron. Safety Warning No warning applicable
